CHIMERA.afk_monitor: Monitors inactivity, alerts console when idle threshold reached. Toggle with /afk, set time with /afktime, set movement tolerance with /afkradius.
CHIMERA.current_weapon_info: Displays equipped weapon name, magazine & reserve ammo top-left. Periodic updates, toggle /wpninfo.
CHIMERA.grenade_proximity_warning: Shows warning when a live grenade is nearby, direction as clock-face (e.g., 12 = ahead). Toggle /grenwarn.
CHIMERA.idle_reminder: HUD reminder ('You there?') after configurable idle time. Toggle /idle.
CHIMERA.low_ammo_warning: Flashes 'LOW AMMO!' HUD warning when magazine ammo below configurable threshold. Repeats while low.
CHIMERA.mini_compass: Shows cardinal direction compass (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW) on HUD. Smooth updates, toggle /compass.
CHIMERA.ping_display: Displays current ping in ms on HUD. Toggle /ping.
CHIMERA.player_details: /pinfo <index> displays team, health, shields, weapon, ammo, coordinates to console.
CHIMERA.player_status: Live console overlay of all players' team, health/shield %, weapon, ammo. Toggle /pstatus.
CHIMERA.rest_break_reminder: On-screen break reminder after configurable playtime (default 45 min), repeats until acknowledged. Toggle /breaks.
CHIMERA.session_clock: HUD elapsed time since map start (HH:MM:SS). Toggle /session_clock.
CHIMERA.show_player_position: Real-time console display of precise X,Y,Z coordinates, customizable format. Toggle /show_pos.
CHIMERA.tip_rotator: Rotates gameplay tips on HUD covering positioning, awareness, strategy. Toggle /tips.
CHIMERA.vehicle_speedometer: Shows vehicle speed (km/h) on HUD when driving. Toggle /speedo.

admin.client_crasher: Auto-crashes joining players whose name/hash matches config, real-time banning.
admin.notify_me: Console notifications: joins, quits, kills/deaths (with cause), first blood, commands, game start/end. ASCII logo, timestamps, cracked client detection.

chat.chat_formatter: Custom chat templates: player name, ID, message. Global/team/vehicle chat, option to ignore specific commands.
chat.delayed_welcome: Sends private welcome message after a few seconds delay when player joins.
chat.end_game_messages: End-of-game private messages based on kill count, taunts to congratulations.

gameplay.camo_speed: Temporary speed boost on Active Camo pickup for configurable duration.
gameplay.killer_rewards: Spawns random equipment at player location on configured killstreak (e.g., 10,20,30 kills).
gameplay.nade_launcher: Toggle /nade to replace any projectile with high-speed frag grenade, making any weapon a grenade launcher.
gameplay.set_flag_limit: Overrides CTF flag capture limit to custom value, reapplied each game.
gameplay.set_respawn_time: Forces a fixed respawn time (seconds) for all players, overriding gametype.
gameplay.set_running_speed: Applies a speed multiplier to all players on spawn.
gameplay.tactical_insert: /tac set marks current location as spawn point, toggle, clear, status. One-time or persistent.
gameplay.vehicle_blocker: Prevents entering vehicles per team, configurable per vehicle tag, custom block message.
gameplay.vehicle_triggered_portals: Map-specific portal spheres: vehicle with player in required seat teleports whole vehicle to destination.

gametypes.custom_loadouts: Choose from multiple weapon loadouts with custom ammo/grenades, applied on spawn. /loadout to switch, admin override, selection menu.
gametypes.one_in_the_chamber: Pistol with 1 bullet, +1 per kill, melee when empty. Headshot insta-kills.

modules.phasor_util: Reusable library: player health/shields/pos/team/weapons/speed/color/ping, game state, IP validation, string formatting, wildcard matching, object type detection, bit manipulation, designed for require().

notifications.auto_message: Sends configurable announcements at intervals, multi-line, optional console output.
notifications.flag_capture_notify: Console message on flag capture with player name, team, total captures.
notifications.vehicle_entry_notify: Console log on vehicle entry: vehicle name, seat (Driver, Gunner).

utility.player_count_timer: Periodic console message: current players / max slots.
utility.server_name_changer: Rotates server name from a predefined list every few seconds.

RELEASES.admin_manager: Full SAPP admin system replacement: unlimited hierarchical levels, IP/hash/name bans, admin chat, command spy, join messages, SHA-256 hashing, JSON storage.
RELEASES.battle_royale: Custom BR mode: shrinking safe zone, loot crates with random weapons, map configs, auto management. Start with no weapons, scavenge to survive.
RELEASES.laa_patched: LAA-patched haloce.exe/halo.exe removes 2GB memory limit, allows up to 4GB on 64-bit Windows. Improves stability with large maps/mods.
RELEASES.phasor_server_templates: Ready-to-run Phasor V2 templates for Halo PC/CE. Fully configured with Windows/Linux quick-start scripts. Extract and launch.
RELEASES.pre_game: Pre-match warmup: AR + 2 frags, infinite time/score. When 3+ players, LO3 countdown and map reset to start real game. All game modes.
RELEASES.sapp_server_templates: Ready-to-run SAPP server templates for Halo PC/CE. Includes SAPP, map vote, sample Lua, Windows/Linux launchers. Extract and run.
RELEASES.wordbuster: Advanced profanity filter (21 languages, leet-speak detection). Warns, kicks/bans, admin immunity, in-game word list management.

admin.admin_manager: Drop-in replacement: hierarchical levels, IP/hash/name bans, admin chat, command spy, alias lookup, SHA-256 hashing, per-level join messages, JSON storage.
admin.afk_system: Advanced AFK detection: movement/camera/input tracking, custom thresholds, voluntary AFK, admin immunity, progressive warnings, kick messages.
admin.alias_system: Logs player aliases by hash/IP. Admin lookup with pagination, pirate hash detection, cooldowns, auto cleanup.
admin.anti_aimbot: Multi-layered aim-lock detection: velocity/trajectory/behavior analysis, weapon profiles, sensitivity adjustment, false positive mitigation, live monitoring, enforcement actions.
admin.anti_camp_v1: Zone-based camping detection with map-specific restricted areas, progressive warnings, cooldowns, auto reset, custom timers/radius.
admin.anti_camp_v2: Map-wide camping detection, adjustable radius, progressive warnings, cooldowns, auto reset on spawn/movement.
admin.anti_impersonator: Identity protection via hash/IP verification, kick/ban actions, whitelist, logging. Detects clones, name spoofing, admin impersonation.
admin.auto_eject: Force ejects players from any vehicle they enter, 1s loop check. Infantry-only.
admin.ban_on_sight: Instantly ban by ID, IP enforcement, ban list view, live connection monitoring, admin notifications.
admin.block_duplicate_ips: Detects/block duplicate IP connections, actions: kick/ban, LAN exceptions, admin notices.
admin.breadcrumb_tracker: Tracks player identity across name changes via IP/subnet, hash, optional VPN detection (IPQualityScore). Suspicious join alerts with risk score 0-100%. /crumbs query. Pirate hash flagging, 24h API cache, JSON storage, auto cleanup.
admin.clear_chat: Instant global chat clearing with admin access controls and notification options.
admin.client_crasher: Auto-crashes clients matching banned criteria (names/hashes/IPs), admin crash commands.
admin.dynamic_ping_kicker: Adaptive ping kicker: limits adjust with player count, warnings, admin immunity, logging.
admin.freeze_players: Freeze players: weapon management, movement restriction, customizable notifications, admin permissions.
admin.geo_location: Geolocate players on join via ip-api.com, optional country block. Display fields, /country command, cache (1h TTL), debug IP. Needs JSON, HTTP client.
admin.melee_kicker: Melee kills instantly kick victim. Optional admin-only melee kicks. Works with flags/oddball.
admin.multiclient_detector: Multi-client detection with probability 0-100% via port ranges, hashes, behavior. Risk categories, admin alerts.
admin.mute_system: Mute system: manual/spam mute, command whitelist, timed mutes, anti-spam thresholds, punishments.
admin.name_ban: Kick/ban players with default names after grace period, custom messages.
admin.name_replacer: Replaces blacklisted/default names with random unique names from list, respects length limit.
admin.on_teleport: Detects player teleports by position change, for debugging/anti-cheat.
admin.reg_to_play: Mandatory registration with password, time limit, auto-kick, persistent players.txt, permissions.
admin.report_system: In-game /s_report to file player/bug reports. Admins: /reports (paginated), /report_clear, /players. Cooldown 60s, auto-expiry 600s, logging, admin level 2.
admin.suicide_punisher: Punishes excessive suicides in time window, config thresholds, grace, kick/ban durations.
admin.suspend_players: Suspend players: freeze, strip weapons, mute chat, persistence. Unsuspend command.
admin.tag_enforcer: Kicks unauthorized players using clan tag based on IP/hash whitelist to prevent impersonation.
admin.the_punisher: Punishes betrayals/friendly fire: progressive warnings, actions (kill/kick/crash), thresholds, logging, notifications.
admin.timed_authentication: Clan tag join prompt: must type secret phrase within time limit or be kicked. Lightweight access control.
admin.vehicle_blocker_v1: Restrict vehicle access per map, seat restrictions (driver/passenger/gunner), auto eject, delay.
admin.vehicle_blocker_v2: Improved vehicle blocker: better handling, player teleportation on block, smoother transitions.
admin.vote_kick: Vote kick: players vote to kick, % threshold, admin immune, cooldown, anonymous voting, cancel.
admin.vpn_blocker: Blocks VPNs/proxies/high-risk IPs via IPQualityScore, risk thresholds, kick/ban, logging.
admin.word_buster: Profanity filter (21+ languages, leet-speak). Warnings, kick/ban thresholds, admin immunity, live word list management.

chat.admin_chat: Private admin chat with /ac. Spam protection, message formatting, permission levels, notification sounds, cooldowns.
chat.april_fools_chat: Makes other players 'say' your messages when triggering words used. Permission-level limited
chat.april_fools_word_shuffler: 1/3 chance to scramble chat messages, readable but jumbled.
chat.chat_ids: Appends player slot numbers to chat messages, customizable for global/team/vehicle.
chat.expressions: Chat commands (!anger, !taunt, !cuss) with randomized responses. Configurable phrase lists and formatting.
chat.flip_a_coin: Virtual coin flip command simulates thousands of flips instantly, shows stats, configurable.
chat.force_chat: Admin forces player to 'say' a message, with permissions, formatting. Use for RP/announcements. May be detectable.
chat.proximity_chat: Proximity chat: communication limited by distance, per-map ranges, dead player options, team/vehicle modes, admin range adjustment.
chat.rcon_chat: Forwards chat to RCON hud with player IDs, team/vehicle differentiation.
chat.rules_command: /rules command displays server rules, configurable auto-announcements, timed display.
chat.simple_poll_system: Admin-created timed polls, players vote via /vote, results broadcast at end.
chat.team_chat: Private team channels, invite system, team/global modes, 1-3+ player private chats, permissions.

gameplay.air_strike: Periodic rocket strikes at predefined map locations, random heights/trajectories, player warnings.
gameplay.ammo_resupply: Command to refill ammo, grenades, battery. Cooldowns, permission restrictions.
gameplay.auto_troll: 17+ prank modules: silent kills, damage mod, chat scramble, teleport, force exit, ammo manipulation, fake messages, inverted controls, etc. Permissions and target filters.
gameplay.block_team_damage: Blocks all team damage: weapons, grenades, vehicle collisions. Configurable, live monitoring.
gameplay.cheat_hax: /hax sets dead player's score/stats to 9999, all gametypes, admin level 4.
gameplay.color_changer: Players change armor color via command, 18 colors, persists through respawns, admin restrictions.
gameplay.color_reservation: Reserve armor colors for VIPs by hash in FFA Slayer. Non-VIPs get random colors, color conflict protection.
gameplay.custom_colors: Custom team colors for all modes, extensive options.
gameplay.custom_loadouts: Select weapon loadouts with custom ammo/grenades, persist across respawns.
gameplay.custom_teleports: Map-specific teleport zones, instant transport, adjustable radius, crouch-only option, shortcuts.
gameplay.damage_multiplier: Admin adjusts player damage multiplier (1-10x) via command, optional reset, permissions.
gameplay.damage_multiplier_changer: Global damage multiplier config for weapons, grenades, vehicles, environment.
gameplay.deployable_mines: Deployable mines from vehicles: per-life limit, timed despawn, adjustable radius, team damage options, visual counter.
gameplay.disable_fall_damage: Disable fall damage per map, configurable.
gameplay.drive_as_gunner: Allows players to drive as gunners in specified vehicles (rwarthog, mp_warthog).
gameplay.flashlight_vehicle_entry: Enter vehicles by aiming+flashlight key, all standard vehicles, configurable.
gameplay.flying_vehicles: Make ground vehicles fly via command, configurable vehicle selection, permissions, auto reset.
gameplay.gravity_gun: Physics gravity gun: pick up/launch objects (vehicles, weapons, equipment). Configurable range, rotation, velocity, cooldowns, mass restrictions.
gameplay.grenade_launcher: Convert weapons/vehicle guns to grenade launchers, configurable velocity, map-specific grenade types, toggleable, auto-disable on death option.
gameplay.headshot_blocker: Disables headshot damage, all weapons/gametypes, no config needed.
gameplay.health_regeneration: Gradual health regen, faster when lower health. Lightweight.
gameplay.infinite_ammo: Keeps all players' ammo/clips maxed out at all times.
gameplay.item_sky_spawner: Auto-spawn random items at map coords, config timing, height, despawn.
gameplay.items_from_heaven: Periodic random weapon/vehicle spawns at map locations, config intervals, auto cleanup of unused items.
gameplay.kill_zones: Map kill zones: warns then kills after delay, team-specific, custom messages.
gameplay.killer_reward: Spawn weapons/equipment at victim's death location, drop tables, kill streak requirements, mixed modes.
gameplay.liberty_vehicle_spawner: Instant vehicle spawn via chat, auto-enter, abandonment detection, despawn timers, multi-vehicle, per-map config.
gameplay.market_account_saving: In-game economy: earn currency from combat, buy temporary perks (god mode, camo, damage boost). JSON account persistence, admin controls, cooldowns.
gameplay.market_no_account_saving: Earn money, buy temporary perks, all reset on death/game end. Admin money commands.
gameplay.mode_destroy_gun: Toggle mode: weapon fire destroys hit objects (vehicles, weapons, equipment). Object type feedback, permissions.
gameplay.mode_enter_gun: Toggle mode: shoot vehicle to enter it. Various vehicles, admin toggle, feedback.
gameplay.mode_spawn_gun: Shoot to spawn objects (weapons, vehicles, powerups, 40+). Auto cleanup on death, manual cleanup.
gameplay.nitrous_boost: Vehicle nitrous: flashlight key boost, finite meter, HUD, auto recharge.
gameplay.no_damage: Toggle damage immunity via command, memory-based.
gameplay.portal_gun_type_1: Shoot to teleport, works on foot and in vehicles. Admin controls, persistent states.
gameplay.portal_gun_type_2: Crouch + shoot to teleport, foot only. Admin controls, persistent.
gameplay.random_grenades: Random grenade counts on spawn, configurable ranges or map presets.
gameplay.rank_system: Performance-based ranking: credits for actions, multi-tier ranks/grades, leaderboards, JSON persistence, admin management.
gameplay.remove_grenades: Disable grenade spawning per gametype, keep pickups, for SWAT etc.
gameplay.replace_weapon_projectile: Replace weapon projectiles with custom ones, damage multiplier, all weapons/vehicles.
gameplay.rocket_launcher_malfunction: Rockets randomly explode while held, config frequency, chaotic.
gameplay.roll_the_dice: Gamble command: random outcomes like vehicle spawn, weapon, inventory wipe, temp shield, launch.
gameplay.self_destruction: Flashlight key triggers self-explosion, cooldown, visual effects.
gameplay.server_fun_plus: Admin fun commands: rocketing, forced chat, fake joins/quits, random teleport, slap, spam, zap, nuke, color change, crash.
gameplay.shield_regen: Instant shield recharge after damage, configurable delay.
gameplay.snipers_dream_team: Overhauls 20+ weapons/vehicle guns: projectile physics, custom explosions, per-weapon mods, vehicle weapon upgrades, grenade tweaks. Memory-based, not for competitive.
gameplay.spawn_from_sky: Sky spawn with temp god mode until landing, pre-configured map spawn points.
gameplay.spawn_protection: Post-spawn invulnerability, configurable time, option to block damage output.
gameplay.spawn_where_killed: Respawn at exact death location, foot and vehicle.
gameplay.sprint_system: Sprint system: stamina, speed boost, exhaustion, HUD, flashlight key, customizable.
gameplay.stun_grenades: Grenades slow victims on explosion, varied durations per type.
gameplay.super_jump: Super high jump with cooldown, togglable.
gameplay.tactical_airstrike: Call airstrike at 5 kills, 3 targeting modes, map-specific, config projectiles, team restrictions.
gameplay.tactical_insertion: Set next spawn point via command, limited uses, must be alive.
gameplay.team_color_voting: Vote for team colors from 10+ presets between games, HUD display, auto apply winner.
gameplay.truce: Truce system: request/accept/deny, mutual damage prevention, persistent across maps, status tracking.
gameplay.uber: Summon yourself into teammate's vehicle, config seat priority, cooldowns, auto-eject, crouch activate.
gameplay.vanish: Vanish mode: invisibility, camo, speed, invincibility, radar hide, objective restrictions. Warnings for carriers.
gameplay.vehicle_fuel: Fuel system: per-vehicle max fuel, speed-based consumption, refuel stations, live gauge. Snail mode when empty, map-specific stations.
gameplay.weapon_durability_jam_system: Weapon durability: progressive decay, jamming per weapon type, melee to clear jams, ammo preserved, overheat prevention.
gameplay.weighted_weapons: Weapon weight affects speed, stamina depletes when moving, regens at rest, exhaustion penalties, visual feedback.

gametypes.attrition: Limited-life team mode with revival: crouch over death orb (skull) to revive, visual progress, team-based, config timing.
gametypes.capture_the_flag: CTF on Slayer maps: single flag, return to any base to score. Config scoring, flag respawn, map points, team/FFA support.
gametypes.cranked: Cranked: speed/damage boost after kill, must chain kills or explode. Per-map config, countdown timer, explosion death, boost params.
gametypes.divide_and_conquer: Killing opponent converts them to your team. Team balance, min players, auto start, victory when team eliminated, auto map rotation.
gametypes.frag_nation: Grenade-focused: limited grenades, kill rewards, melee when out, config loadouts, victory conditions, weapons/vehicles restricted, plasma pistol primary.
gametypes.gun_game: Weapon progression: advance tiers on kill, demotion on suicide, config loadouts, infinite ammo option, leaderboard, admin controls.
gametypes.hunter_prey: FFA flag control: hold flag to score over time, auto respawn, map-specific locations, live scoring, leaderboards.
gametypes.juggernaut: Juggernaut mode: one powerful player with buffs, role passes on kill or time out, timed rotation, auto balancing, visual feedback.
gametypes.kill_confirmed: Collect enemy dog tags to score, tag despawn timer, team scoring, top player tracking, all gametypes.
gametypes.melee_attack: Melee only: no weapons/equipment, skull strike insta-kill, no pickups, oddball melee mechanics, optimized respawns.
gametypes.needles_galore: Needler-only mode, config properties, infinite ammo option, no other weapons/vehicles, auto assignment, modifiers.
gametypes.one_in_the_chamber: Pistol with 1 bullet, insta-kill, +1 per kill, melee when empty. Weapon restrictions, precision focus.
gametypes.parkour: Parkour: checkpoints, timed runs. Track best/avg times, completions, respawn at last checkpoint, death limits, run resets. Visual aids, commands for teleport/reset/leaderboard.
gametypes.sabotage: Bomb plant/defuse: central bomb, crouch to plant/defuse, config timers, map locations, explosion rewards.
gametypes.shotty_snipes: Shotgun & sniper only, no other weapons/vehicles. Config: infinite ammo, bottomless clip, damage modifiers, auto assign.
gametypes.survival_slayer: Survival Slayer: countdown life timer, +time per kill, first to kill limit wins. HUD timer, configurable base time, bonus, limit.
gametypes.swat: SWAT: headshot-only with pistol/sniper, no other weapons/vehicles. Config: infinite ammo, bottomless clip, score limits, loadouts.
gametypes.tag: Tag: Tagger chases Runners, tag transfers role. Runners score over time, Tagger bonus per tag. Config rotation, speed, scores, duration.
gametypes.team_defender: Team Defender: hold flag for double team points, assist bonus. Roles: carrier, defenders, attackers. Random flag spawn, config respawn, multipliers.
gametypes.zombies_advanced: Zombies: humans vs zombies, convert on kill, Alpha/Standard types, Last Man Standing bonuses, camo, vehicle restrictions, config attributes.
gametypes.zombies_standard: Basic zombies: convert on kill, simple speed/respawn adjustments, zombie camo, win when all infected.

modules.map_coordinates: Library of spawn/teleport coordinates for all standard maps, for reuse.
modules.pagination: Pagination library: config page size, navigation, boundary checks, flexible formatting, hints.
modules.rcon_text: Advanced RCON messages: multi-format, priority queues (Low-High-Critical), display modes (persistent/timed/repeating), grouping, player/global, conditional, lifecycle management.
modules.score_handler: Custom scoring: point values for headshots, assassinations, flag captures, betrayals, zombies, kill streaks.
modules.uber_vehicles: Vehicle config library for Uber system: tag paths, seats, enabled status, display names, insertion order, whitelist. Stock/custom vehicles.

notifications.admin_messages: Admin join announcements per level, chat/RCON output, customizable formatting, colors, toggleable.
notifications.auto_message: Scheduled announcements: rotating multi-line messages, interval 30-300s, colors, chat+console, timestamps, on-demand triggers.
notifications.beep_on_join: System beep on player join, audible alert.
notifications.command_spy: Logs admin command usage with notification levels, blacklist, detailed logs.
notifications.console_logo: Custom ASCII art logo in console, with variables, colors, centering.
notifications.discord: Discord integration for server events, configurable event types, requires SAPPDiscordBot.
notifications.game_countdown: Live countdown of game time left in HH:MM:SS.
notifications.kill_counter: Shows kill count after each kill, customizable messages.
notifications.mvp_join_alerts: Custom join alerts for MVP players (by IP/hash/name) and generic greetings for others.
notifications.notify_me: Console notifications: color-coded events, custom formatting, player tracking, ASCII art, timestamps.
notifications.rage_quit: Detects rage quits (quit after death/short play), humorous broadcasts, configurable windows.
notifications.random_fact_generator: Fetches Chuck Norris facts periodically, option to replace name with player. Needs HTTP client & JSON.
notifications.status_timer: Periodic console player count / max slots (default every 3s).
notifications.taunt_on_end_messages: End-game taunts based on kill count, from gentle ribbing to backhanded compliments.
notifications.tea_bagging: Detects tea-bagging (crouching near corpses), broadcasts taunts, configurable radius/crouch count/cooldown, admin toggle.
notifications.welcome_messages: Personalized join welcome messages, expandable for timed/player-specific greetings.

utility.admin_add_me: Grants instant level 4 access. Used for quick testing.
utility.auto_lead: Auto sets no-lead per map/gametype, map-specific presets, adjusts on rotation.
utility.auto_team_balance: Smart team balance: count-based, optional skill-aware. Frequency 30-300s, min players, force balance, avoid mid-game, protect parties, notifications.
utility.block_replace_objects: Block or replace specific objects (weapons, vehicles, equipment) per map, runtime control.
utility.ctf_flag_position_logger: Logs CTF flag spawn coordinates at game start to console, for map data collection.
utility.custom_command_cooldowns: Cooldown timers per command, player-specific, anti-spam, monitoring.
utility.custom_spawns: Custom spawn points per map/team, FFA support, avoid overlaps, caching, retries.
utility.custom_vehicle_spawner: Custom vehicle spawns with auto respawn on abandon/destroy, position monitoring.
utility.custom_wdel: Wdel that protects flags/oddball from deletion.
utility.cyborg_spawner: Spawns decorative cyborgs at map locations.
utility.delay_skip: Delays map skip vote for configurable time, with notifications.
utility.dynamic_race_laps: Adjusts race lap limit based on player count, per-map size configs, auto announce.
utility.dynamic_score_limit: Adjusts score limits dynamically by player count, per gametype configs.
utility.get_object_identity: Admin object inspector: type, name, meta ID, coordinates, permissions.
utility.get_server_name: Retrieves server name, example for welcome messages.
utility.item_spawner: Spawn weapons, vehicles, equipment, bipeds, projectiles. Caching, cleanup, paginated listing, and items with seat and amount options.
utility.list_players: Admin player list with IP, team, connection status, customizable output.
utility.live_on_3: LO3 countdown with map reset, permissions, death message suppression.
utility.map_list: Shows current/next maps and modes from mapcycle, customizable.
utility.map_list_with_map_spec: Map cycle monitor with position tracking, spec indexing, live tracking, position queries.
utility.map_skip_tally: Skip vote tally persists across matches, player-specific, JSON storage, admin queries.
utility.map_vote_system: Enhanced map voting: unlimited options, re-voting, streak protection, timing controls, feedback.
utility.mapcycle_manager: Mapcycle manager: size-based cycles, admin controls, auto adjust for player count, extensive config.
utility.object_spawner: Persistent object spawning with auto-respawn. Spawns weapons, vehicles, equipment at config coords. Respawns after pickup, destruction, or movement outside radius. Vehicles only respawn if unoccupied & moved. Held weapons safely ignored on respawn. Map-specific configuration.
utility.per_map_score_limits: Set score limit per map at game start, default fallback.
utility.ping_checker: View own/others' latency via command, custom formatting, permissions.
utility.play_time: Tracks player playtime: total hours, join count, session duration. JSON persistence, individual/server queries.
utility.pre_game: Pre-match warmup: AR+2 frags, infinite time. At 3+ players, LO3 & map reset, then real game. All modes.
utility.race_assistant: Forces vehicle use in race: grace periods, warnings, penalties, safe zones, admin exemptions.
utility.random_name: Assign random names from pool, unique per session.
utility.restart_mapcycle: Restarts mapcycle after delay when server empty, prevents stagnation.
utility.script_manager: Load/unload scripts per map/gametype, error handling.
utility.seed_score_protection: Prevents score loss from killing bot/seed players, config bot names.
utility.server_logger: Logs game events (joins, deaths, commands) with timestamps, config event types, sensitive command filtering, pirate detection.
utility.server_name_changer: Rotates server name from list at intervals.
utility.set_respawn_time: Config respawn time per map/gametype, admin override, global/player-specific, silent mode.
utility.show_admin_names: Command to list online admins with permission levels.
utility.sync_admins: Sync admins.txt/users.txt with remote server, fallback to local backups, HTTP, validation.
utility.sync_your_files: Sync specified files with remote, local backup fallback, keyword validation.
utility.t_slayer_team_spawns: Enforces team-specific spawn points in Team Slayer.
utility.team_shuffler: Auto/manual team shuffle with min players, FFA detection, suppress death messages during shuffle.
utility.teleport_manager: Teleport system: map-specific warps, create/delete/list, location history, overwrite protection.
utility.timed_server_password: Removes server password after config time (default 5 min), notifies players.
utility.track_master: Race tracker: live lap times, personal bests, map/global records, avg lap, total laps. JSON storage, commands for stats/top5/rankings, auto announces records. FFA & Team.
utility.vehicle_tag_utility: Logs vehicle tag path to file on command, for analysis. Appends to vehicle_tag_utility.txt.
utility.weapon_assigner: Assign weapon loadouts per map/mode/team, up to 4 weapons, tag validation, fallback configs.
